purpose: Create, configure, send messages to, and manage the lifecycle of a Copilot conversation session

activities.title: Create Session Instance
activities.description: Allocate CopilotSession via client.createSession(config) — configures model, provider, system message, tools, hooks, agents, MCP servers

activities.title: Send User Prompt
activities.description: Dispatch prompt to CLI via session.send() or session.sendAndWait(); triggers agent loop on server

activities.title: Process Agent Loop Turns
activities.description: CLI iterates LLM calls; each turn = 1 API call; SDK receives turn_start/turn_end events; loop continues until no tool calls remain

activities.title: Handle Session Idle
activities.description: Receive session.idle event indicating agent finished; resolve sendAndWait promise

activities.title: Compact Session History
activities.description: Trigger history compaction when context utilization exceeds threshold (80% background, 95% blocking)

activities.title: Resume Existing Session
activities.description: Reconnect to persisted session via client.resumeSession(sessionId); restore conversation state from checkpoints

activities.title: Disconnect Session
activities.description: Clean up session resources; fire onSessionEnd hook; optionally persist state
